_description: Declared, intentional asymmetries between the Claude (.claude/) and Copilot (.github/) CHAOS surfaces. check.mjs treats anything that differs and is NOT listed here as drift. Each entry is self-documenting via its `reason`. Remove an entry when the asymmetry is resolved; `--strict` flags entries that are no longer justified.

copilotOnly.name: opsx-apply
copilotOnly.reason: OpenSpec experimental flow. Mirrored on Claude as the openspec-apply-change skill, not a .claude/commands wrapper.

copilotOnly.name: opsx-archive
copilotOnly.reason: OpenSpec experimental flow. Mirrored on Claude as the openspec-archive-change skill.

copilotOnly.name: opsx-explore
copilotOnly.reason: OpenSpec experimental flow. Mirrored on Claude as the openspec-explore skill.

copilotOnly.name: opsx-propose
copilotOnly.reason: OpenSpec experimental flow. Mirrored on Claude as the openspec-propose skill.

copilotOnly.name: opsx-sync
copilotOnly.reason: OpenSpec experimental flow. Mirrored on Claude as the openspec-sync-specs skill.

copilotOnly.name: CSharpExpert
copilotOnly.reason: Generic C# fallback agent retained on Copilot only (config.yaml agents.copilot.csharpExpertFallback). The CHAOS-integrated specialist chaos-csharp-implementation-specialist exists on both surfaces.

contentParity._description: Dimension 6. After normalization (.claude/skills -> .github/skills; frontmatter stripped for agents/commands), every line that differs between the two surfaces must match one of these regexes (defaults in check.mjs always include Claude/Copilot surface wording, .prompt.md invocations, and /chaos- slash commands). perFile keys are pair ids: skills/<skill>/<relpath>, agents/<name>, commands/<name>. --strict flags perFile patterns that match nothing.
